c5d99331-8931-4e61-96b9-c6c102caed56.text: This one felt challenging from the start because there weren’t many obvious moves available. It felt rewarding to solve, but definitely required more effort and patience than a typical easy puzzle.

Overall, it was a relaxing and enjoyable puzzle that didn’t require too much effort to finish.

9446574b-0355-d74f-29fc-b7bb99fcc93b.author: k
9446574b-0355-d74f-29fc-b7bb99fcc93b.text: At first I looked at the last row and noticed the easiest possible common sum looked like 17. Based on that, I placed 4 in the missing cell of the 4th row, which made both the 4th row and 5th column add up to 17. After that, the remaining cells started falling into place pretty quickly. Once that first connection clicked, the puzzle felt quite easy to finish.

e44d0b4f-f092-8790-a596-c2fd535a30a2.text: This one was quite hard. I first looked for a strong clue instead of trying to solve every row at once. 1b610572-6898-8daa-3b5d-c0ec147b4fbd.text: This puzzle was tricky because there wasn’t an obvious row or column to start with. After finding that missing value, I used the same sum to solve the connected columns and gradually filled the remaining cells. Once a few key numbers were fixed, the rest of the board became much easier to complete.
